channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2690] MDS failed to enqueue global quota lock after upgrade from 2.1.4 to 2.4
item.description:
After upgrade system from 2.1.4 to 2.4, when trying to extract a kernel tarball, client hang. The MDS dmesg shows:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == upgrade-downgrade Pass == 19:26:03 (1359343563)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == upgrade-downgrade Check Lustre quotas usage/limits == 19:26:04 (1359343564)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == upgrade-downgrade Verify the data == 19:26:10 (1359343570)
LustreError: 8063:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff880312ca4450 x1425374976147511/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-OST0000_UUID@10.10.4.134@tcp:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343579 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 8063:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
LustreError: 10294:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff880417b38850 x1425374975098995/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0000_UUID@0@lo:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343580 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The ldlm_enqueue operation failed with -71
LustreError: 10883:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-71
LustreError: 10886:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-71
LustreError: 10294:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
LustreError: 7877:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff88021a2bd850 x1425374975099001/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0000_UUID@0@lo:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343581 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The ldlm_enqueue operation failed with -71
LustreError: Skipped 2 previous similar messages
LustreError: 10887:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-71
LustreError: 10887:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
LustreError: 7878:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff88021a2bd050 x1425374975099002/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0000_UUID@0@lo:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343583 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 11-0: an error occurred while communicating with 0@lo. The ldlm_enqueue operation failed with -71
LustreError: 10888:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-71
LustreError: 7877:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff88021a26c850 x1425374975099004/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0000_UUID@0@lo:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343586 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 10890:0:(qsd_reint.c:58:qsd_reint_completion()) lustre-MDT0000: failed to enqueue global quota lock, glb fid:[0x200000006:0x10000:0x0], rc:-71
LustreError: 7878:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) @@@ PLAIN lock request from IBITS client?  req@ffff88021ce8ec50 x1425374975099009/t0(0) o101->lustre-MDT0000-osp-MDT0000_UUID@0@lo:0/0 lens 456/0 e 0 to 0 dl 1359343590 ref 1 fl Interpret:/0/ffffffff rc 0/-1
LustreError: 7878:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1228:ldlm_handle_enqueue0()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
item.environment:
before upgrade server and client are running 2.1.4
after upgrade server and client are running lustre-master build #1186
item.summary: MDS failed to enqueue global quota lock after upgrade from 2.1.4 to 2.4

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: This should be duplicated with LU-2674.
